svg.title: ApplyTrackr feature pipeline — end to end
svg.desc: Full feature pipeline from two entry paths through design, implementation, AC verification, PR review, CI, merge, and deployment.

g.text: Claude runs (up to 30 turns · 3-attempt retry on 529)
reads source files · fetches external URLs in request
#Y contains: subtask JSON · AC · human verification steps
design doc · subtask JSON · AC · verification steps
owner refines #Y in Claude Code session
Claude implements · lint + tsc + vitest · 1 retry on failure
commits feat: [N/M] · ticks checkbox in #Y on success
subtask fails both attempts → partial PR · IMPL_FAILED=true

svg.text: Phase 3 — AC verification · verify-ac composite action

g.text: Claude generates Playwright test from #Y acceptance criteria
runs against local Supabase + Next.js · self-heals on failure (1 retry)
2nd failure → labels PR needs-acceptance-testing · test never committed
PR opened — always manual merge required
feat/issue-N-timestamp · GH_PAT push · Closes #X · Closes #Y · human verification steps in body
4 CI checks → supabase db push → vercel deploy --prod
migrations before code · closes #X and #Y · resolve-sentry-on-close fires
